name: Chad Williams
title: Former Navy SEAL & Evangelist
bio: American former Navy SEAL who served in Iraq. After leaving the military, he became a full-time evangelist and author of 'SEAL of God.'
faith: Williams went from a rebellious youth to the Navy SEALs and then to Christ. He was profoundly impacted by the death of his SEAL mentor Scott Helvenston in the Fallujah ambush. He now travels the world sharing the gospel as an evangelist.

videos.title: Chad Williams - SEAL of God Testimony
videos.note: Williams has widely shared his testimony from SEAL to evangelist

sources.title: SEAL of God
sources.note: By Chad Williams. His journey from Navy SEAL to evangelist

sources.title: Chad Williams — From Navy SEAL to Evangelist

tagline: Former Navy SEAL who found his ultimate mission in Christ
